description: Small fragment. Both verso and recto containing legal documents, each written by a different scribe. On recto marriage and betrothal are mentioned, but only little text is preserved. On verso another legal document, probably written by Halfon b. Menashshe Halevi (Date: 1100-1138) but only little text is preserved. AA
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
